html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Winter's Feast

Winter's Feast Trees can be grown by planting a Pine Cone, a Birchnut, a Twiggy Tree Cone or Palmcone Sprout in a Festive Tree Planter. Like regular Evergreens, Birchnut Trees, Twiggy Trees and Palmcone Trees, they take four stages to grow, however, once they are fully grown, they will stop their life cycle.

When fully grown, players have the ability to decorate the Winter's Feast Tree with Winter Ornaments and certain Winter Foods, Wind Charm, Pearl's Stockings and Bloomers, and Wagstaff's Glove. Winter's Feast Trees have 8 item slots for ornaments to be placed on them. Each Slot corresponds to a specific spot on the tree. The trees can also serve as light sources if they are decorated with Festive Lights.

Winter's Feast Trees can be chopped with an Axe, dropping the resources of its respective tree and of equal size drops, as well as any Ornaments placed on them. The Festive Tree Planter will also be destroyed and drop its crafting materials.

If a player sleeps within 6.5 pitchfork tiles of a Winter's Feast Tree, a Gift will appear under the tree. In order to receive the Gift, the tree must be in complete darkness, without light. To sleep near the tree while keeping it in darkness, the player can use Bed Rolls. To use Tent, the player can hold a Torch, enter Tent before Night, or sleep with Festive Lights on the Winter's Feast Tree. In Winter, the player can sleep with a hot Thermal Stone in inventory but the Tent cannot be too close to the tree. A light source (like Mushlight) can also be placed near the Tent because it is the Winter's Feast Tree has to be in darkness, not the player.

After the player is sleeping near a Winter's Feast Tree in complete darkness, a soft ringing of a bell will be heard shortly and a gift can be found under the tree. If there are multiple trees near the player, there will be one gift under each tree, but only one of them contains valuable items.

This feature has a cooldown of four days for a Gift of valuable items. If a player tries to obtain another valuable Gift during the cooldown or attempts to obtain more than one valuable Gift from multiple Winter's Feast Trees, any additional Gifts will instead only contain one Charcoal and a Winter's Feast treat. The following table lists the items that can be obtained from the Gift. Trinkets, Festive Baubles, and Festive Lights can also be obtained from these Gifts (not listed in table):

Condition Possible Gift Contents
Less than 4 days or
More than 1 Winter's Feast Tree 		Slot1 1-3x random of Winter Food
Slot2 1x
4 or more days and
Partially Decorated 		Slot1 1-3x random of Winter Food
Slot2 1x random Festive Bauble
Slot3 (30%), (15%), (7.5%),

(4.5%), (3%), (1.5%)

Slot4 1x random Trinkets
4 or more days and
Fully Decorated 		Slot1 4-6x random of Winter Food
Slot2 1x random Festive Bauble (fancy) or Champion Adornment or Appeasing Adornment
Slot3 (30%) (15%), (7.5%),

(4.5%), (3%), (1.5%)

Slot4 (14%),
(7%)

Like regular trees, Winter's Feast Trees are able to provide protection from Rain and Overheating for players close to it.

Festive Tree Planter

The Festive Tree Planter is a craftable Structure located in the Decorations Filter and Structures Filter and requires 2 Manure and 1 Board to craft. It is always available to craft during the Winter's Feast Event and does not require prototyping.

Festive Tree Planters can be Hammered like other craftable Structures, as long as they are empty or the planted Winter's Feast Tree is still a sapling. Otherwise they have to be removed by chopping the planted Tree with an Axe. Destroying a Festive Tree Planter will return 1 Boards and 1 Manure, as well as a Pine Cone, Birchnut or Twiggy Tree Cone, if a sapling was growing in the planter.

Wild Winter's Feast Tree

During the Winter's Feast event, players can find Winter's Feast Trees generated in the world. During the Winter season, a Winter's Feast Tree will spawn every 2 days at a random location in either the Deciduous Forest or the Meteor Field, up to a maximum of 3 wild Winter's Feast Trees per Winter. These trees will not disappear even after Winter ends.

Wild Winter's Feast Trees always spawn with several Gifts surrounding them. While a few are good gifts, most are bad gifts. Bad gifts display a special shaking animation, as if something is hiding inside. Picking up a good gift or unwrapping any gift will trigger the trap. All bad gifts will burst open and spawn one Hound or Ice Hound each, and the Winter's Feast Tree will drop all its ornaments and transform into a Treeguard. Bad gifts always contain only the worst possible items (one Charcoal and up to three random Winter Food), but good gifts will always have better contents.

Fighting wild Winter's Feast Trees is usually worthwhile due to their loot, as long as the player has decent weapons and armor. Since they often spawn in the Deciduous Forest, leading the Hounds and Treeguard to the Pig King's village can make it easier to handle them.

Gallery

  • A fully grown and decorated Winter's Feast Tree.
  • To decorate a Winter's Feast Tree, one has to access its inventory.
  • Winter Food used to decorate a Winter's Feast Tree.
  • A freshly planted Winter's Feast Tree.
  • A burnt Festive Tree Planter.
  • Wild Winter's Feast Tree concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.

“Happy Winter's Feast!”
–Wilson
“Looks great!”
–Willow
“Tree looks very happy!”
–Wolfgang
“Oh, joy.”
–Wendy
“IT'S JUST A TREE... WE ARE SURROUNDED BY HUNDREDS OF THEM”
–WX-78
“Lovely job on the tree, dears.”
–Wickerbottom
“Must... not chop...”
–Woodie
“How wretchedly jolly.”
–Maxwell
“A majestic pine, wörthy öf celebratiön!”
–Wigfrid
“Winter's Feast! It's Winter's Feast!”
–Webber
“Shall we "spruce" it up a little? Hm?”
–Warly
“Make pretty!”
–Wormwood
“Now that's a job well done.”
–Winona
“So I just place the baubles right on it?”
–Wortox
“Never saw such pretty tree!”
–Wurt
“I'm glad I've got you to spend the holiday with, Woby.”
–Walter
“It's a fully grown pine tree.”
–Wanda

–Wilson
“Are we gonna grow a tree?”
–Willow
“Very nice little pot!”
–Wolfgang
“We can plant a Winter's Feast tree.”
–Wendy

–WX-78
“Let's grow a proper tree, shall we?”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm sure I have an extra pine cone somewhere.”
–Woodie
“How repulsively festive.”
–Maxwell
“It awaits a grand tree!”
–Wigfrid
“It's just a boring planter without a tree.”
–Webber
“A pinecone should get things rolling.”
–Warly
“For friends”
–Wormwood
“Just needs a tree.”

–Wurt

–Walter
“It will only accept pine cones, apparently.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cây Lễ hội Mùa đông có thể được trồng bằng cách trồng Quả Thông, Quả Dẻ Bulô, Cây Cành Cây Nón hoặc Mầm Palmcone trong Chậu Trồng Cây Lễ Hội. Giống như Cây Thường Xanh, Cây Dẻ Bulô, Cây Cành Cây và Cây Dừa thông thường, chúng trải qua bốn giai đoạn để phát triển, tuy nhiên, khi đã trưởng thành hoàn toàn, chúng sẽ dừng vòng đời của mình.
title: Winter's Feast Tree
